dialogue_texts: It feels like I can breathe freely again. But what is going on? Are you the Queen of the kingdom?
Yes, I am. What just came out of you wasn't just some random curse.
This heavy, suffocating texture is known as "glohm". It has the Order's name written all over it.
A type of curse that turns people into living statues so they don't interfere with their music.
And I think I know the one who did this to you.
I can't remember exactly, but it was probably Berenice Grieg?
Berenice Grieg? She's probably an Order admin who used my own desire for isolation against me.
She's now on the Royal Most Wanted list.
She probably saw your silence as a perfect canvas.
She didn't just put you to sleep; she painted you right out of existence.
How cruel... she simply took someone's heart just to complete a song.
That's Berenice for ya - a high-class talent with bottom-shelf ethics.
But she made one mistake: she set up a stronghold here without a permit.
I'm going to have a word with the composer.
I think her next movement needs a lot more explosions!
